description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 and a cache on node_modules. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a grunt_build job that runs npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt", and find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; it stores ./${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip and ./doc as artifacts, captures coverage with the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/, and runs only on the master and develop branches. In the deploy stage add a marketplace_deploy job that runs npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt build", and uploads the zip via curl to http://marketplace.digidoki.com/api/v2/marketplace/spas/token-$MARKETPLACE_TOKEN; it runs only on the master branch.
